advancements.astralenchant.budding_arcan: Harvest a Budding Amethyst block and embed it into an Arcanium Ingot.
advancements.astralenchant.enchanters_wo: Craft an Enchanter's Workbench. Swap your enchantments at will!
advancements.astralenchant.enchantment_v: Obtain an Enchantment Vessel. Let's craft some magnificent enchantments!
advancements.astralenchant.resonant_vess: Obtain a Resonant Vessel. Let's craft even greater enchantments!
advancements.astralenchant.root.title: Astral Enchant
astralenchant.configuration.angle_per_le: At level n, the allowable difference between the orientation toward an entity and the viewing angle is expressed by the following formula: n * (angle) * π / 180
astralenchant.configuration.base_cost.to: At level n, the consumed experience levels are calculated as: (Current Experience Levels) * (Cost Rate) / √n + (Base Cost) / n
astralenchant.configuration.can_break_un: At level 4, allows breaking normally unbreakable blocks such as Bedrock. Behavior is not guaranteed when used by non-player entities.
astralenchant.configuration.cost_rate.to: At level n, the consumed experience levels are calculated as: (Current Experience Levels) * (Cost Rate) / √n + (Base Cost) / n
astralenchant.configuration.disabled_tag: Manages the tags removed from attacks. If any invalid values are present, the default values will be used.
astralenchant.configuration.effective_fo: Whether the mining speed bonus is applied to blocks that do not have a preferred tool, such as glass.
astralenchant.configuration.extra_tag.to: Manages the tags applied to attacks. If any invalid values are present, the default values will be used.
astralenchant.configuration.hide_name.to: Disabling this may improve compatibility with certain tooltip decoration mods.
astralenchant.configuration.ignore_bypas: If disabled, Last Stand will not activate against damage with the BYPASSES_INVULNERABILITY tag (such as /kill or the void).
astralenchant.configuration.include_over: Whether to include bonuses from overloading applied to other enchantments in the total level. Regardless of this setting, Overload levels are always applied to the level of Essence of Enchant itself.
astralenchant.configuration.max_cost.too: Regardless of the two settings above, no more experience than this amount will be consumed.
astralenchant.configuration.max_total_le: Caps the total enchantment level used to prevent unlimited stat scaling from stacking excessive enchantments.
astralenchant.configuration.multiplier.t: Example: If set to 1, the modifier is increased by +20% at a total level of 20.
astralenchant.configuration.recover_heal: The player's health after being revived by the effect. If set to 0, the player will die again on the next tick.
astralenchant.configuration.save_block_e: Converts blocks into items while preserving their block entity data, such as the contents of a chest.
astralenchant.configuration.save_block_s: Converts blocks into items while preserving their block state, such as orientation.
astralenchant.configuration.unbreakable_: The hardness value applied when mining unbreakable blocks, such as bedrock.
attribute.astralenchant.cooldown_duratio: Multiplier applied to item use cooldown duration
enchantment.astralenchant.affinity.desc: Ignores all restrictions and allows any enchantment to be applied.
enchantment.astralenchant.almighty.desc: Makes the tool suitable for all blocks. Enables mining of indestructible blocks.
enchantment.astralenchant.curse_of_encha: Locks the item's enchantments, prevents them from being changed.
enchantment.astralenchant.curse_of_ignor: Replaces the tooltip with obscured text.
enchantment.astralenchant.distortion.des: Deflects missed attacks to nearby enemies.
enchantment.astralenchant.essence_of_enc: Increases all item stats based on the total level of all enchantments other than this one.
enchantment.astralenchant.expanse.desc: Increases the number of curio slots the item currently occupies by the enchantment level.
Collects even normally unobtainable blocks as an item. Preserves block entity data, and while sneaking, preserves block states as well.
enchantment.astralenchant.last_stand.des: Consumes experience points to avoid death.
Negates various damage reductions, and makes attacks deal their full damage.
enchantment.astralenchant.overload.desc: Increases the level of existing enchantments.
enchantment.astralenchant.reactive_armor: Negates effects that bypass armor and enchantments for certain types of damage.
enchantment.astralenchant.resilience.des: Reduces the cooldown of all items.
gui.astralenchant.enchanters_workbench.l: Can't be enabled because it conflicts with another enchantment!
item.astralenchant.arcane_quartz.desc: Its radiance has enthralled countless enchanters since ancient times.
item.astralenchant.arcane_quartz_tiny_du: Obtained by crushing Arcane Quartz using a falling anvil.
item.astralenchant.arcanium_boots.desc: When the item breaks, its enchantments are dropped as enchanted books.
item.astralenchant.arcanium_chestplate.d: When the item breaks, its enchantments are dropped as enchanted books.
item.astralenchant.arcanium_helmet.desc: When the item breaks, its enchantments are dropped as enchanted books.
item.astralenchant.arcanium_leggings.des: When the item breaks, its enchantments are dropped as enchanted books.
item.astralenchant.luminite.desc: Can be used as fuel for the Enchanter's Workbench.
modmenu.descriptionTranslation.astralenc: Adds enchantments you've never seen before.
